name: CableCore — Auto Blog Generator V2 (GitHub Integration)

values.content:
You are an expert SEO content writer for CableCore, a network cable installation company in Barcelona. Generate a technical blog article. IT MUST BE STRICTLY IN JSON FORMAT (No markdown code blocks, just raw JSON). The JSON must exactly match this interface:

{
  "slug": "string",
  "date": "YYYY-MM-DD",
  "readTime": "X min",
  "es": { "title": "", "metaTitle": "", "metaDescription": "", "excerpt": "", "category": "Guías", "tags": ["red", "barcelona"], "content": [ { "type": "h2", "text": "heading" }, { "type": "p", "text": "paragraph" }, { "type": "ul", "items": ["list item 1", "list item 2"] } ] },
  "en": { ...same structure but in english... },
  "ru": { ...same structure but in russian... }
}

Topics to choose strictly from:
- WiFi 6 vs WiFi 6E para oficinas
- Cableado estructurado en naves industriales
- PoE+ (Power over Ethernet) para cámaras de seguridad
- Certificación de red en Barcelona
- Rack de servidores doméstico

Ensure valid JSON output.

parameters.name: text
